Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun. It looks like you're at Iwatodai Station now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's so late, we were starting to get worried...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Um, did you run into any trouble?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh! I see. I hope everything's all right...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'll let Kirijo-senpai know. We're in the command room right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}O-Oh, I see... Well, as long as you're okay...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It's already past curfew though, so that's a little bit of an issue...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Actually, um, I'm with Kirijo-senpai right now in the command room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'll go ahead and navigate you back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I'm sure you'll be fine, but considering what happened with Koro-chan, I'd rather play it safe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And it's really close to you, {f 4 1}-kun! It's over at the Moonlight Bridge![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's too dangerous to go alone. You should stay put until everyone else gets there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Oh no...! There's another reading near the Shadow! It's a person![n]{f 1 1}
